name: Fruit & Nut Stuffed Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 6 Thick pork chops, with stuffing pocket cut
2 cups Italian seasoned bread crumbs, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pork chops with pepper; set aside.
2. Combine 1 1/2 cups bread crumbs with remaining ingredients except for 1/2 cup orange juice in a bowl.
3. Stuff each pork chop and coat the other side with the remaining bread crumbs.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Place chops in a 13X9X2-inch baking pan and drizzle with remaining orange juice.
6. Bake, covered, for 20 minutes.
7. Uncover and bake another 30-35 minutes.
8. Serve immediately.
